
<iframe title="Galaxy Workflow Embed" style="width: 100%; height: 700px; border: none;" src="http://k8s-galaxy-ffd82cb77f-464836041.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com/published/workflow?id=b5e09c44653605fe&embed=true&buttons=true&about=true&heading=true&minimap=true&zoom_controls=true&initialX=-20&initialY=-20&zoom=1"></iframe>
